description: Stores error records from Power Automate agent flows for monitoring and diagnostics. Each row represents one flow error occurrence.

columns.description: Primary key. Auto-generated GUID for each error record.
Name of the Power Automate flow that generated the error.
Full error message and stack trace captured from the flow run.
ID of the AssistantCard record affected by this error, if applicable.
Severity level of the error (e.g., Warning, Error, Critical).
Whether this error has been investigated and resolved by an admin.

notes.design_rationale: Organization-owned table so all admins can view and manage error records regardless of which user's flow run generated the error.
notes.security: Table uses Organization ownership type. All users with the security role can see all error log rows — appropriate for admin-level monitoring data.
notes.system_columns: Standard Dataverse system columns (createdon, modifiedon, statecode, statuscode) are created automatically and do not need to be defined here.
